headline: Fortinet Firewall Launch Highlights AI Workload Push And Rich Valuation Risk
summary: Fortinet (NasdaqGS:FTNT) has introduced new FortiGate 3500G and 400G next-generation firewalls. The products are aimed at data center scale and enterprise edge environments with high-performance, AI-driven workloads. The new firewalls focus on managing encrypted traffic and hybrid networks with advanced ASIC acceleration and AI-powered threat intelligence. For investors tracking the cybersecurity sector, Fortinet sits at the intersection of network security, AI workloads, and increasingly...
